title: portulaca teretifolia
intro: Portulaca teretifolia, also known as the four-leaf portulaca, is a type of flowering plant native to China and Southeast Asia. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Portulaca teretifolia include its ability to treat fever, cough, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used topically in creams and ointments to treat skin irritations and wounds.
